projects.title: Smart Notice Board
projects.description: IoT-based wireless notice board system that enables remote content updates without physical access.
projects.longDescription: An IoT-based wireless notice board that eliminates the need for physical notice boards. The system allows administrators to update content remotely via a web interface, with real-time display updates using ESP32 and wireless communication protocols. Designed for educational institutions and corporate environments.

projects.title: Gas Leakage Detection
projects.description: Automated gas sensor detection system with real-time alerts and Python-based monitoring dashboard.
projects.longDescription: A smart safety system that detects hazardous gas leaks using MQ-series sensors integrated with a Raspberry Pi and Python backend. The system triggers immediate alerts via buzzer, LED indicators, and sends SMS/email notifications. A real-time dashboard built with Python displays sensor readings and historical data.

projects.title: Water Conservation System
projects.description: IoT-based water conservation and monitoring system with automated flow control.
projects.longDescription: An intelligent water management system that monitors water usage, detects wastage, and automates conservation through smart valve control. Built using Arduino, flow sensors, and soil moisture sensors, the system provides real-time monitoring and analytics to help reduce water consumption by up to 40%.
